title: BiblioMurf
body:
### The amazing MurfGames library mod!

This is just another library mod for use with my other mods, nothing happens when this mod is installed on its own.

If you are a developer and you want to use my dodgy code, check out the [GitHub Repo](https://github.com/mrflappi/BiblioMurf) for documentation

[![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/T6T61T1SK5)

[Check out my other work](http://murfgames.co.uk/)

[**Wishlist my original game NIGHTMAZE on Steam**](https://store.steampowered.com/app/4584550/Nightmaze/)
